hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then cd /Users/ambition/shrine-map && npm run test:e2e:ci || { printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"E2E CI tests failed — fix failing tests before pushing."}'; exit 1; }; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running E2E CI tests before push...
